title: EV vs Gas Cost Calculator - Compare Ownership Costs
description: Free EV vs gas car cost calculator. Compare total ownership costs including fuel, maintenance, and purchase price over time.
keywords: ev vs gas calculator, electric car cost comparison, EV savings calculator, electric vs gas car, EV total cost
h1: EV vs Gas Car Cost Calculator
intro: Compare the total cost of owning an electric vehicle versus a gas car. Enter your driving habits to see which saves more.

faq.q: Are electric cars cheaper to own?
faq.a: EVs typically cost less to operate ($0.03-0.05/mile vs $0.10-0.15/mile for gas), but have higher purchase prices. Break-even is usually 3-7 years.

faq.q: How much do you save on fuel with an EV?
faq.a: The average EV driver saves $800-$1,500 per year on fuel costs compared to a gas car, depending on electricity rates and gas prices.
Yes, EVs have fewer moving parts, no oil changes, and regenerative braking reduces brake wear. Maintenance costs are 30-50% lower.
